name: Baal - COTL
description:
A bloom I bring unto thee, most comely dear (Baal gifts you a camellia).

Flowers in my hair make my wish that you were here

When my mind goes away, oh, I hope that you'll be near me

Flowers in my hair makes me wish that you were here

When my eyes go away, when my time goes

Art by Aveloka
creator: Zeeisha
